result.anchor_clause: "(iii) from and after the 2025 Incremental Amendment Effective Date, Aristech and Altuglas, (iv) any Securitization Subsidiary, if a Subsidiary of the Lead Borrower and (v) any Subsidiary of an Unrestricted Subsidiary."
result.unrestricted_subsidiary_designation_flex: The definition of "Unrestricted Subsidiary" was amended and restated to include, in addition to listed subsidiaries and those designated by the Board of Directors, "(iii) from and after the 2025 Incremental Amendment Effective Date, Aristech and Altuglas, (iv) any Securitization Subsidiary, if a Subsidiary of the Lead Borrower and (v) any Subsidiary of an Unrestricted Subsidiary." Board of Directors retains designation authority; specific named entities (Aristech, Altuglas) are hard-coded as Unrestricted Subsidiaries.

baskets.name: Asset Sale cash consideration threshold (Section 7.05(n))
baskets.value: greater of $20,000,000 and 0.75% of Total Assets — Dispositions at or above this price must yield ≥75% cash/Cash Equivalents
baskets.quote: with respect to any Disposition pursuant to this clause (n) for a purchase price equal to or greater than the greater of $20,000,000 and 0.75% of Total Assets (as determined at the time of such Disposition), the Lead Borrower or any of its Restricted Subsidiaries shall receive not less than 75% of such consideration in the form of cash or Cash Equivalents

baskets.name: Asset Sale non-cash consideration deemed-cash cap (Section 7.05(n))
baskets.value: greater of $100,000,000 and 4.25% of Total Assets
baskets.quote: (C) aggregate non-cash consideration received by the Lead Borrower or the applicable Restricted Subsidiary having an aggregate fair market value ... not to exceed the greater of $100,000,000 and 4.25% of Total Assets, as determined at the time of such Disposition

lme_vectors.rationale: The amendment expands the Unrestricted Subsidiary definition to hard-code Aristech and Altuglas as Unrestricted Subsidiaries and to include any subsidiary of an Unrestricted Subsidiary, moving those assets outside the restricted group.
lme_vectors.basis: Amended and restated definition of 'Unrestricted Subsidiary' clauses (iii) and (v); Section 7.04(g) permitting mergers/dispositions of the Co-Borrower and Restricted Subsidiaries.
lme_vectors.quote: (iii) from and after the 2025 Incremental Amendment Effective Date, Aristech and Altuglas ... and (v) any Subsidiary of an Unrestricted Subsidiary.

lme_vectors.rationale: The provided text does not include any restricted payments covenant or basket.
lme_vectors.basis: No Section 7 restricted-payment clause is present in the excerpt.

lme_vectors.rationale: The excerpt references a prior 2025 Incremental Amendment and 2023 Incremental and Refinancing Amendment but sets no incremental debt capacity or MFN terms in the amended text.
lme_vectors.basis: References to prior incremental amendments only; no incremental facility sizing in the provided clauses.
lme_vectors.quote: from and after the 2025 Incremental Amendment Effective Date

lme_vectors.rationale: The text is silent on lien subordination, sacred rights, or voting thresholds beyond noting the Consenting Lenders constitute Required Lenders for this amendment.
lme_vectors.basis: Amendment effected under Section 10.01 with Required Lenders; no priming or pro rata sharing provisions quoted.
lme_vectors.quote: The Borrowers, Holdings and the Consenting Lenders desire to amend the Credit Agreement in accordance with Section 10.01 of the Credit Agreement

F.Subject

(i) temporarily waive their default-related rights
and remedies against the Borrowers and the other Loan Parties solely with
respect to the Specified Defaults and (ii) permit the
Borrowers to continue or convert Term Loans as Benchmark Rate Loans,
notwithstanding the occurrence of any Specified Defaults.

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration
of the foregoing, the terms, covenants and conditions contained herein and
other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency
of which are hereby acknowledged, the parties hereto agree as follows:

SECTION 1.Amendments to Credit Agreement. The Borrowers, Holdings and the

pay interest at the Default Rate under the Credit Agreement (including pursuant

SECTION 11.Further Assurances.

The Borrowers and each other
Loan Party agrees to take all further actions and execute all further documents
as the Agent may from time to time reasonably request
to carry out the transactions contemplated by this Agreement and all other
agreements executed and delivered in connection herewith.

SECTION 12.Section Headings.

Section headings in
this Agreement are included herein for convenience of reference only and shall
not constitute part of this Agreement for any other purpose.

SECTION 13.Notices.

All notices, requests, and
demands to or upon the respective parties hereto shall be given in accordance
with the Credit Agreement.

SECTION 14.Effectiveness.

This Agreement shall become
effective as of the first date (the “”) on which each of the following
conditions shall have
been satisfied (or waived by the Required Lenders):

(a)the
Agent (or its counsel) shall have received:

(i)duly
executed signature pages for this Agreement signed by the Required Lenders, the
Borrowers and Holdings; and

(ii)the
written consent of Alter Domus (US) LLC consenting to this Agreement in
accordance with Section 9(b) of the 2023 Incremental
and Refinancing Amendment.

SECTION 15.Assignments; No Third Party Beneficiaries.

This Agreement shall be binding
upon and inure to the benefit of the Borrowers, the other Loan Parties, the
Lender Parties and their respective successors and assigns;
provided, that neither the Borrowers nor any other Loan Party shall be entitled
to delegate any of its duties hereunder or to
assign any of its rights or remedies set forth in this Agreement without the
prior written consent of the Agent in its sole discretion.
No Person other than the parties hereto shall have any rights hereunder or be
entitled to rely on this Agreement and all third-party
beneficiary rights are hereby expressly disclaimed.
                                       8

This Agreement, the Credit

instruments, and documents entered into in connection therewith
(collectively, the “”) set forth in full the terms of agreement between the
parties hereto

relationship between such parties with respect to the subject matter thereof,
superseding all other discussions, promises, representations,
warranties, agreements, and understandings between the parties with respect
thereto. Except as provided therein, no term of the Borrower/Lender
